model: Blend(LightGBM via sklearn Pipeline one-hot, 50%; CatBoostRegressor native-categorical, 50%)
predict_contract: predict(df) = 0.5 * lgbm_pipeline.predict(df[numeric+categorical]) + 0.5 * catboost_model.predict(catboost_preprocessor.transform(df[numeric+categorical])); result is log1p(SalePrice), apply expm1() for a dollar figure
